name: Secret Pizza
teaser: Probably the second best NY slice in Los Angeles. Sean and his team excel at hospitality.
review:
Probably the second best NY slice in Los Angeles. Especially good fresh, though it doesn't travel as well as I'd like. Thankfully there's a laidback courtyard to hang in, and Sean and his team excel at hospitality.

They also have the best merch in town thanks to rocker/artist Mike Krol.
headsUp: The courtyard is great in the evening. Don't rush.
update: New toppings added to the rotation. Still top-tier hospitality.
